RESPONDENTS FILED A CONDITIONAL NON-OPPOSITION TO THE PETITION. ORDER AND A SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Candace Jackman of Cooley LLP telephone number 415-693-2167 for Petitioner Goldman Sachs & Co.
Karl Olson of Ram, Olson, Cereghino & Kopczynski LLP telephone number 415-433-4949 for all Defendants.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS & COMPANY'S Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. Respondents filed a conditional non-opposition to the petition. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
